Item Details:

## input-otp
**Type:** registry:ui
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** input-otp

visual_summary: A one-time password (OTP) input field for receiving and typing a time-sensitive verification code. Typically used for user authentication, such as account recovery or two-factor authorization. Can be found on login or registration pages.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-otp
Description: A one-time password (OTP) input field for receiving and typing a time-sensitive verification code. Typically used for user authentication, such as account recovery or two-factor authorization. Can be found on login or registration pages.
Style: e.g. minimal
Interactions: e.g. clickable
Tags: login, registration, authentication, security

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
